tagline: Your #1 Source For All Of Your Pool & Hot Tub Needs

hero.headline: Where Families Come Together Since 2009
hero.subheadline: Krossber Brothers has helped hundreds of Farmington families create backyard escapes they love. From hot tubs to pools and saunas, we guide you every step of the way.

services.headline: Everything Your Backyard Needs
services.subtitle: From relaxing hot tubs to sparkling pools and wellness systems, we have you covered.

items.title: Hot Tub Sales
items.description: Authorized dealer of Caldera Spas, Finger Lakes Series hot tubs, and quality used units to fit every budget and lifestyle.

items.title: Above-Ground Pools
items.description: Wide selection of above-ground pool models with professional guidance on choosing the right size and style for your yard.

items.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
items.description: Complete pool service including seasonal opening and closing, equipment repair, and ongoing maintenance to keep your pool sparkling.

items.title: Hot Tub Service & Repair
items.description: Expert hot tub servicing, maintenance, and repair to keep your spa running efficiently year-round.

items.title: Saunas & Cold Plunge
items.description: Warm Wave saunas and Emerge cold plunge systems for the ultimate wellness experience at home.

items.title: Water Care & Accessories
items.description: Full line of water care chemicals, spa covers, accessories, and everything needed to maintain crystal-clear water.

how_it_works.headline: Your Backyard Oasis in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call or book online. We'll come to your home, assess your space, and discuss your vision for the perfect backyard.

steps.title: Experience Before You Buy
steps.description: Visit our showroom for a test soak. Feel the difference and find the perfect fit for your family's lifestyle.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: We handle professional delivery, setup, and teach you everything. Plus ongoing service whenever you need us.

about.label: About Krossber Brothers
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats You Like Family
about.description: Since 2009, the Krossber Brothers have been bringing families together through backyard fun and relaxation. We're not a big-box store — we're your neighbors in Farmington, NY who genuinely care about helping you find the right pool, hot tub, or wellness solution. Every customer gets a personalized experience because that's how we'd want to be treated.

features.title: In-Home Consultations
features.description: We come to you with personalized recommendations tailored to your space, lifestyle, and budget.

features.title: Hot Tub Trade-In Program
features.description: Upgrade to a new spa affordably by trading in your current hot tub. We make switching easy.

features.title: Lifetime Service & Support
features.description: From the day you buy through years of enjoyment, we're here for maintenance, repairs, and advice.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We'll walk you through every cost upfront so you can make the best decision for your family and budget.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with your purchase or service, we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. We've built our reputation on trust for 17 years, and we stand behind every product we sell and every service we perform.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for hot tubs and pools?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to help make your backyard dreams a reality. Ask us about current promotions during your consultation.

faqs.question: Can I try a hot tub before I buy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a unique test soak experience at our showroom so you can feel the quality and comfort before making a decision.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Farmington, NY and all surrounding Ontario County communities. Contact us to confirm service availability in your area.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs and pools you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service all makes and models of hot tubs and pools. Whether you bought from us or not, our technicians can help keep your equipment running smoothly.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get a new hot tub installed?
faqs.answer: Most hot tub deliveries and setups are completed within 1-2 weeks of purchase, depending on site preparation needs. We'll give you a clear timeline during your consultation.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: We have used Krossber for 25 years. They are very knowledgeable and friendly, willing to explain and help out with patience. I can't say enough about them and recommend them to everyone.

testimonials.name: Hot Tub Buyer
testimonials.text: Jeremiah is trustworthy and knowledgeable. He made the hot tub buying process easy and stress-free, walking us through every step and going above and beyond with maintenance questions.

testimonials.name: Pool Equipment Customer
testimonials.text: Krossber was very competitive on pricing for pool equipment installation, which went off perfectly. Friendly and helpful — it truly feels like you are part of the family.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch today for your free in-home consultation. No pressure, just honest advice from a family that cares.
benefits: Free in-home consultation with no obligation
Personalized recommendations for your space and budget

footer.description: Krossber Brothers Pool And Spa has been Farmington's trusted source for pools, hot tubs, saunas, and service since 2009. Family-owned, community-focused.
